emails.subject: ClickPaper-Woodlands Forest Product
emails.body: ClickPaper-Woodlands Forest Product Per our conversation, the above counterparty is approved by Legal to trade online physical pulp paper only. We cannot trade financial until Credit receives financial statements and can determine whether they are an eligible swap participant or not.
